programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals and the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ and his family as they visit an aquarium and sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: Antiks
programme.desc: When a delicious berry is in peril, the Antiks spring into action! Join them on a heroic rescue mission to save the tasty treat from a terrible fate. They'll have to be brave, work together, and overcome some big challenges to bring the berry safely back home. It's an exciting adventure that shows even the smallest heroes can make a big difference.

programme.title: Antiks
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and so have the Antiks! Join them as they explore a world of blossoming flowers and fresh spring treats. From climbing giant mushrooms to navigating through a garden of delights, their adventures are as colorful as the season. It's a story about discovery, teamwork, and enjoying the sweet tastes of spring.

programme.title: Blippi Wonders
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi and his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts and how ducks float. Blippi and FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: Blippi Wonders
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak and pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags and even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor-who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big and make all his own decisions, but Mom and Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions and feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Join Baby John for a fun day at school! First, he learns that karate can be challenging, but with a lot of practice, he learns how to kick, punch and move! Then, he learns how to play soccer with the help of his big brother and sister. The day continues with a special surprise guest who drops in and teaches the gang how to play different instruments, like the piano, trumpet and guitar! It's always a fun day of learning at school!

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' and have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ and his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes and the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk and some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed and help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy and happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ and his friends learn the importance of washing their hands and how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty and TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup and learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: Spend a whole day with JJ, from morning to night! Wake up and get ready with the family as JJ learns his morning routine. Then, it's off to a big adventure: JJ's first day of preschool! He's a little nervous, but he makes new friends and has lots of fun. After a full day of playing, it's time to get ready for bed. Mommy guides JJ through his nighttime routine of brushing his teeth, taking a bath and reading a story before he drifts off to sleep.

programme.title: Oddbods: Short
programme.desc: Oddbods follows the wacky adventures of seven unique and furry friends, who laugh, play and get up to mischief in their hometown of Oddsville, where even the most ordinary of situations have unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Oddbods: Short
programme.desc: Oddbods follows the wacky adventures of seven unique and furry friends, who laugh, play and get up to mischief in their hometown of Oddsville, where even the most ordinary of situations have unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi and Meekah get curious, exploring environmental science through a scavenger hunt and then building and testing cars for their own big city.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Join Blippi and Meekah as they learn to be on wheels! They visit Moonlight Rollerway to learn all about roller skating safely. Then Blippi joins a roller derby team to master the basics, work on his balance and prepare for a wild ride, with his helmet on, knees padded and laces tied!

programme.title: Meekah
programme.desc: Join Meekah as she heads to Skyzone to explore the science of bouncing! First, she has a big question... how does someone do a flip? She gets some instruction from an amazing jumper, plays on the trampolines and even learns some numbers. Then, she's off on a solo adventure to answer the question, 'how does bouncing work?' She experiments with different kinds of balls to see which bounces best and even discovers the science behind trampolines!

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: It's a strange day for the Oddbods! After being caught in one of Bubbles' experiments, Fuse and Newt accidentally switch bodies! As Bubbles searches for a way to reverse it, an over-excitable Fuse enters the now curmudgeonly Newt into a dance competition. Then, Slick goes on an increasingly desperate quest to find a 'Golden Ticket' for an exclusive disco-party. Plus, Slick is determined to look his best for the group photo.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: The Oddbods are dealing with some big problems! First, the perfect snowy day inspires Pogo to pull some pranks, but they go too far and he and Newt come face-to-face with a hungry bear! Then, Jeff is throwing a party to impress some snooty friends, but his high expectations cause his waiter to quit, leaving him in a disaster. The trouble continues when Newt is asked to look after a mystery parcel and can't resist taking a peek inside!

programme.title: ARPO
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble and other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably and when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: ARPO
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions and robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo and his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, and a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him and Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' and have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ and his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes and the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him and his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa and singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color and help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: Meekah
programme.desc: Meekah is having a magical day at Children's Fairyland! She learns about colors, shapes and numbers as she goes down colorful slides, rides the Jolly Trolly train around the park, plays with bubbles and rides a merry-go-round! Then, while exploring, Meekah discovers a magic key which unlocks a Storybook Box! The box sets her on a journey to use all her five senses to find a yummy treat!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi learns all about bowling in this episode featuring the great indoors. There's always fun to be had even when the weather doesn't cooperate and Blippi knows just how to find it! Blippi learns the proper way to roll a bowling ball and how to knock down the pins for a strike!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi embarks on a big blue sea search, exploring marine animals at aquariums, playing sea creature bingo and even learning how to scuba dive!

programme.title: Gecko's Garage
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues and Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away and forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, and Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck and the Mechanicals, and Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: Gecko's Garage
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko and Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try and steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, and his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: Air Asia Buds Adventures
programme.desc: It's time for a high-flying adventure with the Air Asia Buds! Join them as they explore a busy fire station, visit a fun-filled farm, and learn all about amazing animals. Their journey takes them to incredible destinations around the world, from the vibrant streets of Bangkok and the beautiful beaches of the Philippines to the bustling city of Kuala Lumpur. It's a non-stop trip full of fun, learning, and discovery.

programme.title: VeeFriends
programme.desc: The fun and friendly battles can't be stopped! The VeeFriends keep the good times rolling with a fast-paced game of hot potato and a limbo challenge that tests their flexibility. The competition gets creative with a costume contest to see who has the best disguise, followed by a wild dance-off. From seeing who can build the best fort to a game of 'the floor is lava,' the fun-tastic battles are non-stop.

programme.title: Mia's Magic Playground
programme.desc: Welcome to Mia's Magic Playground! Join Mia and best friends Oskar and Tilly on their wild adventures, as they explore a whimsical land together, full of walking rainbows, ice cream bears and singing trees. No matter what is happening in the real world, adventure always awaits them in their imagination.

programme.title: Mia's Magic Playground
programme.desc: Welcome to Mia's Magic Playground! Join Mia and best friends Oskar and Tilly on their wild adventures, as they explore a whimsical land together, full of walking rainbows, ice cream bears and singing trees. No matter what is happening in the real world, adventure always awaits them in their imagination.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi is back at the Hands On Children's Museum in Washington for more learning and exploring! In these fun adventures, Blippi learns all about building amazing rockets that can fly into space, using powerful wind machines and even performs a little song! He also learns all about tools and how to build a house, has some fun on the ice and gets to explore an awesome firetruck!

programme.title: Meekah
programme.desc: Join Meekah for a big animal hug challenge! First, Blippi and Meekah visit Farm Sanctuary, the perfect place to make friends with animals. They get to feed animals who are all different sizes, from big steers to small donkeys. Then, on another visit, Meekah learns that cows LOVE to be hugged! She wonders what other animals enjoy hugs and sets out to do a HUG CHALLENGE, where she sees if she can hug 10 animals in a day!

programme.title: Insectibles
programme.desc: Zak's bionic arm gets a new upgrade that can project a hologram of himself. After some initial pranks, he is forced to use the new tech to cleverly escape the clutches of some hungry spiders. His day of upgrades continues when one of Gramps's growth experiments actually works, making him slightly larger and stronger. His newfound size comes just in time, as he must use his enhanced strength to rescue Chowser from Hye and Lo.

programme.title: Insectibles
programme.desc: A test of the Shrinkinator goes comically wrong, leaving both Zak and Gramps completely invisible! Zak must embark on a desperate search for a vital part to reverse their new state, a task complicated by Chowser, who thinks he's being chased by Zak's ghost. Meanwhile, Adilla, realizing her aggressive nature is hindering her plans, forces Syd to become her etiquette coach, attempting to learn charm and diplomacy to better manipulate other insects.

programme.title: Supa Strikas
programme.desc: Journey through the world of soccer like you have never seen before! Supa Strikas' quest for Super League glory takes them everywhere and anywhere you can imagine. Their skills and determination get them out of the trickiest of situations.

programme.title: Supa Strikas
programme.desc: Journey through the world of soccer like you have never seen before! Supa Strikas' quest for Super League glory takes them everywhere and anywhere you can imagine. Their skills and determination get them out of the trickiest of situations.

programme.title: Supa Strikas
programme.desc: Journey through the world of soccer like you have never seen before! Supa Strikas' quest for Super League glory takes them everywhere and anywhere you can imagine. Their skills and determination get them out of the trickiest of situations.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: It's a strange day for the Oddbods! After being caught in one of Bubbles' experiments, Fuse and Newt accidentally switch bodies! As Bubbles searches for a way to reverse it, an over-excitable Fuse enters the now curmudgeonly Newt into a dance competition. Then, Slick goes on an increasingly desperate quest to find a 'Golden Ticket' for an exclusive disco-party. Plus, Slick is determined to look his best for the group photo.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: The Oddbods are having a wild day! An incident with Newt and some local birds causes the accidental launch of Bubbles' rocket into space with the birds inside! Then, Fuse feels excluded when all his neighbors become engrossed in a new 'Pokebod' game on their phones and constantly put themselves in danger. Finally, Pogo prides himself on being a master of the prank and sends Bubbles on an elaborate goose-chase into the snowy mountains.

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: The big move to California is almost complete! First, Park Ranger Aaron creates a series of exciting challenges for the new park rangers. These tasks test their skills and teamwork, making sure everything is in place for a safe and fun environment for the dinosaurs. Then, Park Rangers Aaron and LB successfully transport the final dinosaur to the new Dinosaur Park. To celebrate their amazing accomplishment, everyone has a fun pool party with exciting games and mystery surprise toys!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: Get ready for an epic search and rescue adventure with the Park Rangers! First, Park Ranger Zoey accidentally zaps Park Ranger Maddison into the dinosaur wild zone! She will have to use all her park ranger wit to get out safely. Then, Park Ranger Darren goes off to feed the baby Brachiosaurus, but on his mission, he accidentally loses it! Can the park ranger team work together to find the lost baby dino?

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: Get ready for awesome new gadgets and Robo-Girl! When Orson asks the Park Rangers to come up with new dino gadgets, Asher effortlessly comes up with dozens, while Sam struggles to come up with one of her own. Then, Asher's new dino remote control gadget might be a game changer, but first he has to work out the kinks. Sam comes to terms with her origin as a Dino Master invention and helps save the day with her awesome Robo-Girl powers!

programme.title: Blippi's Top 10
programme.desc: 3-2-1, Blast off!! Blippi is curious and loves to learn about the world around him so he's excited to share his top ten favorite space and science moments with his friends!

programme.title: Blippi's Top 10
programme.desc: Racecars, firetrucks, construction vehicles... oh my! Blippi loves learning about vehicles of all shapes and sizes, so he's excited to share his top ten moments in a vehicle! From go-karts to rocketships, and even a Monster Jam truck, these are his favorite vehicle adventures!

programme.title: Blippi's Top 10
programme.desc: Blippi has so many buddies that he loves! There's Meekah, and TABBS, and DBO and all of the friends he meets on his adventures. Blippi invites his buddies at home to join him in remembering some of his favorite moments spent with friends. Awwww!

programme.title: Morphle
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston and Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila and Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her and Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try and get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila and Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: Morphle
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, and Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens and a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: ARPO
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo and Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum and they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride and Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: ARPO
programme.desc: Arpo and Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes and a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: CoComelon
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy and happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ and his friends learn the importance of washing their hands and how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty and TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup and learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!
